options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: ring_link
options.description:
Whether your in-level ring gain/loss is linked to other players.
Disabled (0): Ring Link is disabled.
Enabled (1): Rings are sent and received in normal situations.
Enabled Casinopolis (2): Rings are sent and received in most situations, plus while playing Sonic's Casinopolis.
Enabled Hard (3): Rings are sent and received when including finishing a level and during the Perfect Chaos fight.

options.name: trap_link
options.description: Whether your received traps are linked to other players

options.name: goal_requires_levels
options.description: If enabled, you have to complete action stages to unlock the last fight.

options.name: levels_percentage
options.description: If Levels are part of the goal, Percentage of the available levels that needed to be completed to unlock the final story.

options.name: goal_requires_chaos_emeralds
options.description:
If enabled, you have to collect all the Chaos Emeralds to unlock the last fight.
Keep in mind selecting emerald hunt will require enough checks to add the 7 emeralds to the pool.

options.name: goal_requires_emblems
options.description:
If enabled, you have to collect a certain number of emblems to unlock the last fight.
The emblems are extra items added to the item pool, so they scale with the number of checks.

options.name: max_emblem_cap
options.description:
If Emblems are part of the goal, determines the maximum number of emblems that can be in the item pool.
If fewer available locations exist in the pool than this number, the number of available locations will be used instead.

options.name: emblems_percentage
options.description: If Emblems are part of the goal, percentage of the available emblems needed to unlock the final story.

options.name: goal_requires_missions
options.description: If enabled, you have to complete missions to unlock the last fight.

options.name: mission_percentage
options.description: If Missions are part of the goal, Percentage of the available missions that needed to be completed to unlock the final story.

options.name: goal_requires_bosses
options.description: If enabled, you have to beat all the bosses to unlock the last fight.

options.name: boss_percentage
options.description: If Bosses are part of the goal, Percentage of the available bosses that needed to be completed to unlock the final story.

options.name: goal_requires_chao_races
options.description: If enabled, you have to beat all the chao races to unlock the last fight.

options.name: logic_level
options.description:
Determines the logic the randomizer will use.
Normal Logic (0): Very forgiving, ideal if you are not used to this game or its location checks.
Hard Logic (1): Less forgiving logic, some checks require performing spindash jumps or dying to get the check.
Expert DC Logic (2): The most unforgiving logic, some checks require performing out-of-bounds jumps (DC conversion).
Expert DX Logic (3): The most unforgiving logic, some checks require performing out-of-bounds jumps (vanilla DX).
Expert+ DX Logic (4): Same as Expert DX but with extra speed runner level tricks (vanilla DX).

options.name: starting_character
options.description:
Select which the character you will start with.
Choose between Random (0), Sonic (1), Tails (2), Knuckles (3), Amy (4), Big (5), and Gamma (6).

options.name: starting_location
options.description:
Select in which location you would like to start.
Station Square Main (0): Vanilla starting location and default value.
Random (1): Start in a random location (same for all characters).
Random per Character (2): Each character starts in a different random location.

options.name: egg_carrier_starts_transformed
options.description: If enabled, the Egg Carrier will start transformed allowing easier access to some levels.

options.name: entrance_randomizer
options.description:
Randomizes the entrances to action stages, bosses, sublevels and Chao Gardens.
Disabled (0): No entrance randomization.
Stages (1): Only action stages entrances are randomized.
Stages and Bosses (2): Action stages, bosses, sublevels and Chao Gardens entrances are randomized.

options.name: gating_mode
options.description:
Determines how the rando will close off parts of the adventure field.
Emblems (0): Areas are gated based on the number of emblems collected.
KeyItems (1): Areas are gated based on key items like the Train or Station Key

options.name: send_death_link_chance
options.description: When dying, the chance of sending a death link to another player.

options.name: receive_death_link_chance
options.description: When receiving a death link, the chance of dying.

options.name: ring_loss
options.description:
How taking damage is handled.
Classic (0): You lose all of your rings when hit.
Modern (1): You lose 20 rings when hit.
One Hit K.O. (2): You die immediately when hit.
One Hit K.O. No Shields (3): You die immediately when hit, and you can't use shields or invincibility power ups.

choices.name: one_hit_k_o_no_shields
choices.display_name: One Hit K O No Shields

options.name: playable_sonic
options.description: Determines whether Sonic is playable.

options.name: playable_tails
options.description: Determines whether Tails is playable.

options.name: playable_knuckles
options.description: Determines whether Knuckles is playable.

options.name: playable_amy
options.description: Determines whether Amy is playable.

options.name: playable_big
options.description: Determines whether Big is playable.

options.name: playable_gamma
options.description: Determines whether Gamma is playable.

options.name: sonic_action_stage_missions
options.description: Choose what action stage missions will be a location check for Sonic.

options.name: tails_action_stage_missions
options.description: Choose what action stage missions will be a location check for Tails.

options.name: knuckles_action_stage_missions
options.description: Choose what action stage missions will be a location check for Knuckles.

options.name: amy_action_stage_missions
options.description: Choose what action stage missions will be a location check for Amy.

options.name: big_action_stage_missions
options.description: Choose what action stage missions will be a location check for Big.

options.name: gamma_action_stage_missions
options.description: Choose what action stage missions will be a location check for Gamma.

options.name: music_source
options.description:
Selects the source of the game's music.

You can mix and match music from SADX, SA2B, and custom tracks.
Custom songs are mapped to the Sonic Heroes soundtrack by default,
but you're free to replace them with any songs you prefer.

Choose between: SADX (0), SA2B (1), Custom (2), SADX + SA2B (3), SADX + Custom (4), SA2B + Custom (5),
or SADX + SA2B + Custom (6).

NOTE: You must own SA2B and/or Sonic Heroes on PC to use their music.

options.name: music_shuffle
options.description:
Controls how music is randomized in the game.

Disabled (0 - default): Use original tracks without randomization.
Curated (1): Randomize music using a hand-picked list that fits the original tone.
By Type (2): Randomize songs within the same category (e.g., levels, bosses).
Full (3): Randomize across the entire pool of available tracks.
Singularity (4): Replace every song with the same single track.

Options 1 and 2 are recommended for the most coherent experience.

options.name: music_shuffle_consistency
options.description:
Defines how frequently music changes during gameplay.

Static (0 - default): Music remains the same for the seed/slot.
On Restart (1): Music is reshuffled every time the game is restarted.
Per Play (2): Music changes every time it starts playing.

Note: Shuffling is handled on the client side, using the seed and song.json file.

options.name: life_capsules_change_songs
options.description:
If enabled, collecting a Life Capsule will trigger a music change, based on your current Music Shuffle settings.
Only available if Music Shuffle is consistency is set to Per Play (2).

options.name: boss_checks
options.description: Determines whether beating a boss grants a check (15 Locations).

options.name: unify_chaos4
options.description: Determines whether the Chaos 4 fight counts as a single location or three (Sonic, Tails, and Knuckles).

options.name: unify_chaos6
options.description: Determines whether the Chaos 6 fight counts as a single location or three (Sonic, Big, and Knuckles).

options.name: unify_egg_hornet
options.description: Determines whether the Egg Hornet fight counts as a single location or two (Sonic, Tails).

options.name: enemy_sanity
options.description:
Determines whether destroying enemies grants checks (710 Locations).
You need to enable enemy-sanity for some characters for it to work.

options.name: enemy_sanity_list
options.description:
Determines which enemies are included in enemy-sanity.
Character names are used as values

options.name: missable_enemies
options.description:
Determines whether enemies in missable locations grant checks. This includes:
- Enemies in the Casinopolis Sewers (Sonic and Tails)
- Enemies in the Kart section of Sonic's Twinkle Park

options.name: capsule_sanity
options.description:
Determines whether destroying capsules grants checks (692 Locations).
You need to enable capsule-sanity for some characters and some types for it to work.

options.name: capsule_sanity_list
options.description:
Determines which capsules are included in capsule-sanity.
You can use Character name plus capsule type as values.
X-Life, X-Shield, X-PowerUp, and X-Ring with X being the character name (i.e. 'Sonic-PowerUp')

options.name: missable_capsules
options.description:
Determines whether capsules in missable locations grant checks. This includes:
- Capsules in the Casinopolis Sewers (Sonic and Tails)
- Capsules in the Kart section of Sonic's Twinkle Park
- Capsules in the 'Going Down?' section of Sonic's Speed Highway
- Capsules in the Boulder section of Sonic's Lost World

options.name: pinball_capsules
options.description: Determines whether pinball's capsules grant checks (5 Locations).

options.name: fish_sanity
options.description: Determines whether catching every type of fish grants checks (23 Locations).

options.name: lazy_fishing
options.description:
Enabling Lazy Fishing grants infinite tension during fishing if you have the Power Rod upgrade.
Depending on your option, the Power Rod will be a logic requirement or not for your locations:
0: Disabled (default).
1: Enabled, no requirements (Power Rod is not a logic requirement for any location check).
2: Enabled, fishsanity (Power Rod is a logic requirement for fish-sanity only).
3: Enabled, all (Power Rod is a logic requirement for fish-sanity, B/A/S ranks and every "Keeper" mission for Big).

options.name: randomized_upgrades
options.description: Determines whether upgrades are randomized and sent to the item pool.

options.name: field_emblems_checks
options.description: Determines whether collecting field emblems grants checks (12 Locations).

options.name: chao_egg_checks
options.description: Determines whether getting the 3 secret chao eggs grants checks (3 Locations).

options.name: chao_races_checks
options.description: Determines whether winning the chao races grants checks (5 Locations).

options.name: chao_races_levels_to_access_percentage
options.display_name: Level Access Percentage for Chao Races
options.description:
Percentage of the available levels accessible for the chao races to be in logic.
Higher values means races are required later in the game.

options.name: mission_mode_checks
options.description: Determines whether completing missions grants checks (60 Locations).

options.name: auto_start_missions
options.description: Determines whether missions will start already activated.

options.name: mission_blacklist
options.description:
Determines what missions are blacklisted. The default are:
Mission 49 (Flags in the Kart section of Twinkle Park).
Mission 53 (Triple Jump in the Snowboard section of Ice Cap).
Mission 54 (Flags in the Snowboard section of Ice Cap).
Mission 58 (Flags in the rolling bounce section of Lost World).
Also, you can blacklist all the missions by using the character names. i.e. ['Big', 'Sonic']

options.name: twinkle_circuit_checks
options.description:
Determines whether beating Twinkle Circuit grants a checks
Disabled (0): Twinkle Circuit disabled.
Enabled (1): Twinkle Circuit enabled (1 location).
Enabled Multiple (2): Enable a different track for each character as well (+5 locations).

options.name: sand_hill_checks
options.description:
Determines whether beating Sand Hill grants a check:
Disabled (0): Sand Hill disabled.
Enabled (1): Sand Hill enabled (1 location).
Enabled Hard (2): Harder (points-based) Sand Hill mission enabled (+1 location).

options.name: sky_chase_checks
options.description:
Determines whether beating Sky Chase grants a check:
Disabled (0): Sky Chase disabled.
Enabled (1): Sky Chase Act 1 and 2 enabled (2 locations).
Enabled Hard (2): Harder (points-based) Sky Chase missions enabled (+2 locations).

options.name: junk_fill_percentage
options.description: Replace a percentage of non-required emblems in the item pool with random junk items.

options.name: trap_fill_percentage
options.description: Replace a percentage of junk items in the item pool with random traps.

options.name: ice_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap that freezes the player in place.

options.name: spring_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap that spawns a spring that sends the player flying in the opposite direction.

options.name: police_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap that spawns a lot of Cop Speeder enemies.

options.name: buyon_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap that spawns a lot of Buyon enemies.

options.name: reverse_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap that reverses your controls.

options.name: gravity_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap that increments your gravity.

options.name: reverse_trap_duration
options.description: How many seconds the reverse control trap will last. If set to 0, the trap will last until you die or change level.

options.name: traps_and_filler_on_adventure_fields
options.display_name: Traps and filler on Adventure Fields
options.description: If enabled, traps and filler can activate in the adventure field.

options.name: traps_and_filler_on_boss_fights
options.display_name: Traps and filler on Boss Fights
options.description: If enabled, traps and filler can activate during boss fights.

options.name: traps_and_filler_on_perfect_chaos_fight
options.display_name: Traps and filler on Perfect Chaos Fight
options.description:
If enabled, traps and filler can activate during the Perfect Chaos fight.
Keep in mind that enemy traps will subtract rings from the player.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
